description_long: This object is a single, medium-sized banana with a gently curved shape and a smooth, slightly matte peel. The peel is predominantly yellow with some greenish and brownish spots, especially near the ends and along the underside, indicating natural surface blemishes. The stem is intact and slightly darkened, while the tip at the opposite end is also darkened, showing typical wear. The banana's surface is free from major tears or splits, and the overall form is plump and well-defined. No commercial stickers or labels are visible on the peel. The banana appears fresh and undamaged, suitable for consumption or as a visual prop in an urban environment.
description: A medium-sized, gently curved yellow banana with minor brown spots and intact stem, showing a smooth, matte peel and no visible stickers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and curvature of the banana, with yellow peel and some brown speckling along the lower edge.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rounded tip and stem, with the banana's width and slight taper visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the banana's curve, yellow peel, and a few brown spots near the bottom.
description_view_3: View from the stem end, showing the top of the banana and the transition from stem to peel.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana's peel is smooth and intact, with minor brown speckles and no visible tears, splits, or signs of peeling. The surface shows natural blemishes but maintains good integrity.
